svg.title: Atlas Crew Security — Platform Architecture
svg.desc: Horizontal pipeline: Crucible launches attacks that pass through Synapse WAF (or any bring-your-own WAF) to Chimera's vulnerable targets. Bridge orchestrates the services as substrate. Apparatus appears as a small sidecar — the innovation pipeline where new ideas prototype before becoming features or products.

svg.text: Crucible & Chimera are WAF-agnostic — Synapse is the recommended default; bring your own WAF and the pipeline still works

g.text: Stands up Crucible, Synapse, Chimera, custom services in a coordinated graph
Single binary · dependencies · health checks · teardown
